name: Chocolate Pecan Pie (2)
recipeIngredient: 4 squares Baker's semisweet chocolate, broken into pieces
1 can light or dark corn syrup
recipeInstructions:
Microwave chocolate and margarine in a microwave-safe bowl on high for 1-2 minutes,
or until the margarine is melted. Stir halfway through heating time.
Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
Stir in sugar, syrup, eggs, and vanilla until well blended.
Stir in pecans.
Pour into pie shell.
Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes or until filling is firm 2 inches from the edge.
Cool on a wire rack.
